svg.text: SSM-WM Architecture for Humanoid Robot State Prediction and MPC
Code-aligned method overview: state-action encoding, gated diagonal SSM memory, prediction rollout, and MPC planning
Project each time step to latent tokens
Stack L blocks for long-range temporal memory
LayerNorm, diagonal SSM convolution, gate fusion, and residual update.
Predictions support training loss and online planning.
Key message: lightweight SSM memory replaces expensive sequence modeling, while the predicted next state closes the MPC control loop.
